jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at EazyDiner
jsonLd.description:
We at EazyDiner are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About EazyDiner:
EazyDiner is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EazyDiner!
